title: About
heading: About BarkinMad Studios
intro: Independent retro-inspired games and mobile apps built for iPhone and iPad.

hero.alt: BarkinMad Studios development workspace showcasing game and software creation

sections.heading: Who We Are
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios is an independent UK software and game development studio focused on creating mobile apps, retro-inspired games, websites, prototypes, and digital business tools.
The studio combines software development experience with practical problem solving, building products that are easy to use, maintain, and expand over time.
Whether developing arcade games for players or custom software for businesses, the goal is to create reliable solutions that deliver long-term value.

sections.heading: Experience
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios draws on more than two decades of experience delivering technology solutions across a wide range of industries and business sectors.
This experience includes software development, mobile applications, cloud technologies, digital transformation, workflow automation, business systems, technical consultancy, and solution design.
Projects have ranged from small internal business tools and prototypes through to large-scale systems supporting thousands of users.

sections.heading: Technical Expertise
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios combines experience across software development, mobile applications, cloud platforms, security-focused design, workflow automation, data management, analytics, localisation, and digital transformation projects.
This broad technical background allows solutions to be designed with maintainability, performance, scalability, and usability in mind while remaining practical and cost-effective.

sections.heading: What We Make
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios develops mobile apps, retro-inspired games, websites, prototypes, dashboards, workflow tools, and custom software solutions.
The public portfolio includes the growing ZX Series of arcade games, productivity tools, and specialist applications available for iPhone and iPad.

sections.heading: How We Work
paragraphs: The focus is on practical software that solves real problems without unnecessary complexity.
Projects are approached with a strong emphasis on usability, maintainability, performance, and long-term value.
From early ideas and prototypes through to production-ready applications, BarkinMad Studios aims to keep development focused, transparent, and outcome-driven.

sections.heading: BarkinMad Coins
paragraphs: BarkinMad Coins are a gameplay reward used across supported BarkinMad Studios games.
Coins are earned through gameplay and can be used to unlock cosmetic content such as themes, colours, skins, and visual extras.
BarkinMad Coins have no cash value, cannot be transferred, and cannot be exchanged for real-world goods or services.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: For support, feedback, testing enquiries, partnership opportunities, or project discussions, please contact support@barkinmad.studio.
